content_body: This cabin was excellent on all accounts. It was comfortable, clean, quiet, close to everything yet we felt like we were in a mountain escape. We enjoyed driving over and watching the kayaking and white water rafting at the Ocoee, Mercier Apple Orchards, and a sunset cruise on Lake Blue Ridge. Our favorite part was coffee in the mornings looking out the gorgeous cabin windows or sitting in the porch or watching the deer roam around the cabin. We loved our time at the Aska Escape Lodge. Thank you!
title: We Loved Our Time Here!
